message:
feat(abi): expand io_internal native file ABI with stdio replacement surfaces

Major expansion of the frankenlibc-abi IO internal layer:

- Extend io_internal_abi.rs with comprehensive native file operation
  implementations replacing C library stdio callthrough paths
- Update Cargo.toml with new dependency requirements
- Overhaul io_internal_native_file_test.rs test suite to cover the
  expanded ABI surface including edge cases and error paths
- Update beads issue tracker with current task status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
